The department shall issue specialty license plates for persons who served in the United States armed services and participated in Operation Freedom’s Sentinel. The license plates must include the words “Freedom’s Sentinel.”

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.331 — Operation Freedom’s Sentinel

The department shall issue specialty license plates for persons who served in the United States armed services and participated in Operation Freedom’s Sentinel. The license plates must include the words “Freedom’s Sentinel.”

    (1) the words “Texas Humanitarian Service Medal”; and

    (2) a depiction of the Texas Humanitarian Service Medal emblem.

*Added by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 506 (H.B.2503), Sec. 2, eff. September 1, 2023.*
